title: Proposal Automator - Proposals
description: Tracks generated client proposals including package selection, pricing, and file paths. Created on first run via lazy DB creation.

Project Title.description: Name of the proposed project for identification and upsert matching.

Client Name.description: Client the proposal is for. Used with Project Title for idempotent upsert.

Status.description: Current lifecycle stage of the proposal.

Package Selected.description: Which pricing package the client selected, if known.

Total Amount.description: Price of the selected package in USD.

Proposal File.description: Local file path to the generated proposal markdown file.

Brief File.description: Local file path to the SOW-compatible brief file for /sow:from-brief.

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the proposal was generated.

Sources Used.description: Data sources used to generate this proposal.

Notes.description: Free-form notes about the proposal, client feedback, or follow-up actions.

notes: The plugin searches for this database by name before creating it (lazy creation). Idempotent upsert uses Client Name + Project Title as compound key. Status lifecycle: Draft → Sent → Won/Lost.
